title: Mustardy Australian Jasmininderice Pilaf
description: A warm and aromatic Australian-inspired pilaf dish infused with the tanginess of mustard, featuring jasmine rice and perfectly balanced flavors. A perfect weeknight dinner solution for any time of the year.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add vegetable broth, whisking continuously. Bring to a boil and cook for 2 minutes.
Add Dijon mustard, salt, and black pepper. Whisk until smooth.
Add jasmine rice, thyme, and grated cheddar cheese. Stir to combine.
Transfer the saucepan to a broiler-safe skillet or oven-safe pan. Broil until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted, about 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
